title: Optimizing COPD Combination Therapy: Risun Pharma’s Integrated API Solutions
summary: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) remains a global health challenge requiring complex 'LAMA+LABA+ICS' triple therapies. Risun Pharma is empowering formulation partners with a high-purity portfolio including Fluticasone Furoate and Revefenacin. By overcoming micronization technical barriers, we provide a one-stop API support system that ensures aerodynamic stability and superior clinical efficacy for inhaler development.

title: Closing the Supply Gap: Advanced CNS APIs for Specialized Psychiatric Disorders
summary: The demand for high-end Central Nervous System (CNS) drugs is surging, yet supply gaps for complex molecules remain. Risun Pharma has expanded its portfolio with registered APIs such as Mirogabalin Besylate, Paliperidone, and Safinamide Mesylate. Our cGMP-certified facilities focus on stringent crystal form control and impurity profiling, offering reliable solutions for DPNP and schizophrenia treatments.

title: Precision Targeting: Finerenone API Advancing Heart-Kidney Comorbidity Care
summary: Finerenone, a highly selective non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist (MRA), is revolutionizing the treatment of chronic kidney disease associated with type 2 diabetes. Risun Pharma’s progress in Finerenone API registration marks a significant milestone in precision medicine. We provide global partners with robust DMF documentation and sustainable supply chains to accelerate the entry into the era of targeted cardio-renal therapy.
